manifest.description: Convert notes or selections to Jira/Confluence markup and vice versa.
manifest.name: Markdown to Jira Converter

name: Markdown to Jira Converter

releases.author: muckmuck96
releases.description:
Safer, cleaner, more themeable

- 🔒 **Safer rendering.** The preview window and the "what's new" popup no longer build pages from raw HTML. Your release notes and converted markup are now displayed using Obsidian's own safe renderer.
- 🎨 **Better theme support.** Colors, spacing, and borders in the plugin's pop-ups now come from a stylesheet, so your Obsidian theme can restyle them like any other part of the app.
- ✅ **Cleaner settings page.** Section headings ("Task Lists", "Callouts", "Image Handling", …) now use Obsidian's standard heading style instead of plain HTML, so they match the rest of your settings panel.
- 🤝 **Plays nicer with other plugins.** If another plugin has already handled a paste, this plugin now steps back instead of jumping in on top.
- ⬆️ **Obsidian 1.2.3 or newer is required.** The plugin already relied on features from that version; the minimum is now correct in the manifest so you'll only see it offered on supported Obsidian builds.
- 🧹 **Behind-the-scenes cleanup.** Lots of small code-quality fixes that don't change anything you'll see, but make future updates easier and clear the warnings on the community plugin page.

**Nothing about how you use the plugin has changed.** All commands, settings, and conversions work exactly as before — your existing settings are kept as-is.

releases.author: muckmuck96
releases.description:
Major release with Confluence support, smarter clipboard workflows, and removal of the legacy converter.

### ✨ Added
- Confluence markup conversion for full notes, selections, and clipboard content.
- Automatic Jira/Confluence paste detection with optional Markdown conversion.
- Preview-before-copy option for converted markup.
- Mermaid handling options: keep as code, convert to basic PlantUML, or warn.
- `@username` to Jira mention conversion.
- Jira issue key auto-linking via configured project keys and base URL.

### 🔧 Changed
- Removed the legacy converter and migrated users to the new converter flow.
- Reworked settings UI for output format, clipboard detection, task lists, mentions, issue links, Mermaid, and images.
- Added migration for deprecated converter and image upload settings.
- Expanded test coverage for Jira, Confluence, reverse conversion, and clipboard detection.

### 📖 Notes
- Old legacy-converter settings are removed automatically on startup.

releases.author: muckmuck96
releases.description:
### ✨ New Features
  - **Automatic Image Upload**: Images are now automatically uploaded to ImgBB hosting service and converted to public URLs in your Jira markup (configurable) 
  - **Task List Visualization**: Task list checkboxes (e.g., `[ ]`, `[x]`, `[>]`) are now converted to Jira emoticons with customizable mappings

  ### 🔧 Improvements
  - **Enhanced Converter**: The new converter has been refined with improved reliability, better markdown parsing, and comprehensive test coverage
  - **Smart Image Filtering**: Only actual image files (`.jpg`, `.png`, etc.) are uploaded - markdown and other file embeds are preserved as-is

  ### 🛡️ Privacy & Security
  ⚠️ **Important**: Images uploaded to ImgBB are **publicly accessible** to anyone with the URL. This plugin does **not encrypt** images before uploading. Only use for non-sensitive, non-confidential content. By using ImgBB, you agree to their Terms of Service. This plugin is not affiliated with ImgBB.

  ### 📖 Getting Started
  - **ImgBB Upload**: Get your free API key at https://api.imgbb.com and paste it in plugin settings
  - **Manual Mode**: Prefer to upload manually? Choose "Manual" and the plugin will show helpful drag & drop instructions
  - **Task Lists**: Customize your task checkbox → Jira emoticon mappings in settings
